headline: My S&P 500 Prediction On Sector Outperformers And Underperformers For 2H/2026

headline: Martin Marietta Made a Huge Buy. What the Deal Is Missing.
summary: Martin Marietta stock fell after the company announced a $13.5 billion deal to buy Lhoist North America, a supplier of limestone and steelmaking components.
